name: Epicurean Olives
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Whole Green or Black Olives
12 Fresh Rosemary Leaves, or 1 tablespoon Dried Rosemary, crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Press each olive between your fingers so the marinade will penetrate.
2. Place olives in a jar large enough to hold them securely, with a tight-fitting lid.
3. Layer all ingredients except oil on top of the olives.
4. Pour enough olive oil over the ingredients to completely cover them.
5. Secure the lid and shake well to combine.
6. Refrigerate for 3-4 days, shaking the jar several times during this period.
7. Remove garlic if the olives are to be kept for an extended period.
